summary: Apply body clean across corpus TOMLs + live DB; per-tradition review commits
description: Run clean_bodies.py for real after dry-run review. Commit diffs per tradition so review is scoped. Verify: no chunk count change (4,176), no id change, token totals drop by roughly the audit's estimate, spot-check enuma-elish 001 no longer opens with the Sacred-Texts header.

resolution.note: Applied corpus-wide: 1,048 chunks across 16 traditions, 16 per-tradition review commits. Verified: 4,176 chunks (unchanged), all ids consistent, 6,602 boilerplate tokens removed (2,561,102 -> 2,554,500), enuma-elish 001 opens with primary text in both TOML and DB mirror. Removed-segments report independently reviewed (haiku agent): CLEAN, zero content flagged. enoch-charles-1917.140 (would empty) left refused -> 50438e23.
